delivery.raw: オンライン同期型+非同期型

summary: Occupational and Environmental Health is science and practice concerning prevention, recognition and management of workers’ disease caused by occupational and environmental hazard.
aims: Occupational and Environmental Health is science and practice concerning prevention, recognition and management of workers’ disease caused by occupational and environmental hazard.
goals: Understanding of Industrial Hygiene and Technological Intervention
Understanding of Medical Care for workers
Understanding of Metal and Occupational diseases
Understanding of Noise, Vibration and ionizing radiation

plan.text:
２年間で以下の内容を学修する。
1 Industrial Hygiene and Technological Intervention,
2 Medical Care for workers,
3 Occupational Lung Disease,
4 Metal and Occupational diseases,
5 Organic Solvent,
6 Occupational Cancer,
7 Noise, Vibration and ionizing radiation,
8 Mental Health Problems
他
開講時期未定。

textbooks:
LaDou J. Current Occupational & Environmental Medicine, fourth edition. McGraw Hill.2004.
Levy B et al. Occupational and Environmental Health: Recognizing and Preventing Disease and Injury, Fifth Edition. Lippincott Williams & Wilkins. 2006.
prereq: Occupational and Environmental Health is science and practice concerning prevention, recognition and management of workers’ disease caused by occupational and environmental hazard.
prep: 自己学習およびレポート作成

officeHour.name: 菅沼成文
officeHour.place: 総合研究棟Ⅱ 2階 環境医学教授室
